column2:
RSI: suxamethonium or rocuronium
ICU infusion: cisatracurium (preferred)
Organ failure: atracurium or cisatracurium (Hofmann elimination)
Avoid suxamethonium if ↑ hyperkalaemia risk (burns, denervation, SCI >24hr, major trauma)

Burns
Denervation injuries
Neuromuscular disease
Spinal cord injury (>24hr post-injury)
Severe trauma/crush injury
Known hyperkalaemia
All associated with ACh receptor upregulation → massive K⁺ release on depolarisation
